caption:
Modern hotel in the heart of Bangkok ✨ 
Spacious, comfortable rooms with city views, premium amenities, and modern design🌊Rooftop swimming pool overlooking Bangkok, a fitness centre, and on-site restaurants. Perfectly located with easy access to public transport, shopping malls🛍️, and dining destinations🏙️

📍 Radisson Hotel Chateau de Bangkok 29 Soi Ruamrudee 1, Lumphini, Pathum Wan, Bangkok 10330
